self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Strong Strike (fixed value — Predator is capped at Refinement 1, only one copy was ever obtainable so there is no R5 tier): dealing Cryo DMG increases Normal and Charged Attack DMG by 10% for 6s, max 2 stacks. Modeled at max stacks (+20%). The Aloy-exclusive flat +66 ATK bonus is not modeled since it only applies when Aloy specifically wields this weapon.
